creator: cassius@7Lnetworks.com
text:
Hi,

I'm not sure why but the ISP Vendors list said to use this problem report tool if my company is not in the vendors list - so I'm following the direction on the site. :)

We're not on the ISP vendor list but have been offering FreeBSD dedicated servers for a number of years now.

Here's what we would like to have show up on that page if possible
=====
[a href="https://www.7Lnetworks.com"]SevenL Networks Inc.[/a]
Providing [a href="https://www.7lnetworks.com/freebsd-dedicated-server"]affordable FreeBSD dedicated server hosting[/a], VPS, managed web server offerings, colocation, data center space and other hosting services since 2003.  SevenL currently hosts server infrastructure for Gentoo, Arch Linux, Linux Mint, CentOS, Startcom Linux and a number of open source software projects.  SevenL Networks is located in Toronto, Canada.
=====

Thanks for your time, guys.

Sincerely,
Cassius Adams
Cassius@7Lnetworks.com
